title: MedEffect Canada - Canada.ca
content:
For industry information about COVID-19, visit our COVID-19 health product industry section.
MedEffect Canada provides consumers, patients, and health professionals with easy access to:
- Report an adverse reaction or side effect ;
- Obtain new safety information on drugs and other health products ; and
- Learn and better understand the importance of reporting side effects .

## Latest advisories and recalls
Search for advisories and recalls in the Recalls and Safety Alerts Database
